title: dichocarpum adiantifolium var. sutchuenense
intro: Dichocarpum adiantifolium var. sutchuenense is a plant species in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as a type of buttercup. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as promoting digestion and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
